**Limited Time Offer – Increased Time of Ticketing in Business Class on Transatlantic Destinations with Lufthansa Group**  
\+ 

**Earn more on travel between Canada, United States and Atlantic destinations with Lufthansa Group for tickets issued  between Mar 2, 2026 to Mar 31 2026, for travel from April 1, 2026 to June 30, 2026\.** 

**Cabin TOT Online Rate** 

| Business: J,C,D,Z,P  | ~~5%~~ 8% |
| :---: | :---: |

**Offer details:** 

| Origin/Destination  | Itineraries between Canada, United States and Europe, Middle East, India, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Africa, Commonwealth of Independent States and Russia.  Refer to the Transatlantic Appendix of the Time of Ticketing incentive for a complete list of eligible destinations. |
| ----- | :---- |
| **Ticketing Period**  | March 2, 2026 to March 31, 2026 |
| **Travel Period**  | April 1, 2026 to June 30, 2026\. **All travel must be completed by June 30, 2026\.** |
| **Point of Sale**  | Canada |
| **Channels**  | **GDS only. ACTOT** tour code must be entered in the commission box at time of ticketing. |
| **Plating/Carriers**  | Plating LH 220, LX 724, OS 257 or SN 082, plating carrier must market or operate at least one transatlantic segment.   **Not applicable on AC 014 or UA 016\.**  EXAMPLE: YUL FRA **LH\*AC** (LH marketed, AC operated) FRA BEY **LH** \- BEY FRA **LH** FRA YUL **LH** \= online rate, plating LH 220\. |
| **Other**  | ✈ All other terms and conditions of the Time of Ticketing incentive apply.  ✈ Time of Ticketing will be paid via BSP Settlement process.  ✈ **Does not apply to**: change fees, seat selection fees, meals, upgrades, and all other optional products and services fees, all net fares, including  Leisure/Group net fares and IT/BT (no fare ticketing), Small and Medium Business tickets identified with a PN \# or any other account number,  corporate contract tickets identified with an Air Canada or a joint venture corporate contract number or any other corporate contract number in the tour  code box, including tickets with no corporate discount applied, Aeroplan redemption tickets, industry reduced rates, Air Canada Vacations air-only  tickets, Bereavement travel and any other discount program fares, taxes, surcharge and any fees/charges entered in the tax boxes, Round the World  (RTW) fares, infant fares not occupying a seat and tickets issued via the Air Canada Web link.  ✈ When ACTOT is not entered in the Tour Code box of the ticket or if it is entered incorrectly, a ticketing error fee of minimum $50.00 per ticket will apply  and the commission may be recalled.  ✈ Air Canada may terminate or amend the terms of this Time of Ticketing at any time, for any reason.  ✈ Air Canada can terminate an agency’s participation in the Time of Ticketing offer, with or without cause, at any time. ✈ All information is confidential. No terms, conditions, existence may be disclosed to third parties.  ✈ This offer cannot be combined with any other offers.  ✈ It is prohibited to use this offer to solicit or attract business from another agency, failure to comply may result in removal from this offer. |

2Mar2026
